calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Sautter for Bernice Kountz. Debra Kountz and Donny Kountz also present.

Ms. Sautter explained the extent of services she performed to support her request for extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration Or Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Continued To Apr-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Sautter for and with Debra Kountz (Personal Representative).

Ms. Sautter stated that Mary Irving (Daughter), has contacted Counsel and there was question as to whether they were going to go forward due to a medical lien, and that four of the beneficiaries wanted to buy out the other two. Ms. Kountz stated that she had obtained a letter from a lender in regards to the loan. The matter was continued to April 2, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Giselle Casey CSR#8098. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration Or Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Feb-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - JOAN SAUTER FOR AND IN BEHALF OF THE ADMINISTRATORS

ATTY. SAUTER REPORTED IN COURT THAT THEY ARE IN THE PROCESS OF SELLING THE RESIDENCE AFTER WHICH THE PROCEEDS WILL BE DISTRIBUTED. SHE ALSO INDICATED THAT 4 OF THE HEIRS ARE INTERESTED IN BUYING OUT THE OTHER HEIRS AND ACQUIRE THE PROPERTY THEMSELVES. DEBRA KOUNTZ SPOKE ON BEHALF OF THE OTHER HEIRS INTEREST IN ACQUIRING THE PROPERTY. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO FEBRUARY 5, 2008 FOR STATUS OF COMPLETING WHATEVER NEEDS TO BE DONE AND BRINGING THE ESTATE TO A CLOSE.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration Or Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Continued To Dec-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Joan Sautter appearing for the executors, one of the executor Debra Kountz is also in court.
Counsel reported to the court that they have dealt with the creditors claims. Debra Kountz is is prepared to go forward with the sale of the residence and has a listing agreement in place. They requested a continuance for 60 days. The Court continue the matter to 12/18/07.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Joan Sautter appearing for co-administrators and with Debra Kountz. Nyota Koya is in court. Status of administation reported by counsel. The co-administrators are in the process of selling the house. Creditor's claims have rejected. Ms. Koya said she did not receive the rejection notice. Notice was return to counsel undeliverable. Ms. Sautter served the rejection notice on Ms. Koya in open court. Court accepted the status report. Further status report or petition for final distribution is set on 9/11.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patricia Abalos CSR#13128. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Continued To May-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Continued To Mar-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Joan Sautter appearing for personal representatives of the estate. This estate has been opened since 1997 and the administators have not filed anything since appointment. Counsel has filed for hardship for the heirs on the Medi-Cal claim. She has received no response and she wrote them again recently. The family are living in the home. Creditor's claims have bee filed and they will be rejected. Matter is continued to 3/21 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
Nyota Koya appeared at the end of the calendar and Court informed her of the next hearing on 3/21.
